old_value: {"id":"diffdroneinisaac_workspace-i8x.1","title":"迁移基线与兼容性矩阵定义（DiffAero -\u003e IsaacLab+Newton）","description":"基于reference/diffaero梳理算法、动力学、任务/环境、传感器四个维度的迁移基线，定义每一项在新栈的接口约束、完成定义和验收口径。产出作为后续子任务的统一依赖。","acceptance_criteria":"1) docs/development.md 与 docs/progress.md 的目标范围一致并覆盖多算法/多动力学/多场景。2) 形成可追踪的 capability matrix（source -\u003e target module -\u003e status）。3) 明确每个维度的最低可运行样例与验证命令。","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"1723946555@qq.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T03:16:30Z","created_by":"sycamore-yu","updated_at":"2026-03-12T03:16:30Z"}

old_value: {"id":"diffdroneinisaac_workspace-i8x.2","title":"迁移 PointMass 动力学模型并统一 dynamics registry","description":"将 reference/diffaero/dynamics/pointmass.py 及 cfg/dynamics/{pmd,pmc}.yaml 对应能力迁移到 IsaacLab+Newton 栈，补齐 discrete/continuous pointmass 模型、公共接口与配置注册，并保证与现有环境/训练接口兼容。","acceptance_criteria":"1) 新栈同时支持 discrete pointmass 与 continuous pointmass。2) dynamics registry 或等价工厂可按配置选择 quadrotor / pointmass。3) 至少有一条环境路径和一条训练路径在 pointmass 下可运行并有测试覆盖。","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"1723946555@qq.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T03:20:32Z","created_by":"sycamore-yu","updated_at":"2026-03-12T03:20:32Z"}

new_value: Implemented PointMass physics using Newton backend and created a unified dynamics registry. Validated forward and backward passes with tests.

old_value: {"id":"diffdroneinisaac_workspace-i8x.3","title":"迁移 Position Control 与 Multi-Agent Position Control 环境","description":"迁移 reference/diffaero/env/position_control.py、position_control_multi_agent.py 及对应 cfg/env/{pc,mapc}.yaml，补齐单机位姿控制、多智能体位置控制与必要的 reset/observation/reward/loss 语义。","acceptance_criteria":"1) 提供 position control 与 multi-agent position control 两类环境入口。2) 环境输出契约与现有 obs/state/reward/loss/extras 约定一致。3) 至少覆盖 pointmass 与 quadrotor 中可支持的一种或多种动力学分支，并有基础训练或 rollout 测试。","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"1723946555@qq.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T03:20:38Z","created_by":"sycamore-yu","updated_at":"2026-03-12T03:20:38Z"}
